description: Container runtimes on macOS (and Linux) with minimal setup

name: containerd
description: An open and reliable container runtime

name: gVisor
description: Application Kernel for Containers

name: runc
description: CLI tool for spawning and running containers according to the OCI specification

name: youki
description: Container runtime written in Rust, implementing the OCI runtime specification

name: apko
description: Declarative OCI image builder from apk packages; reproducible by design

name: buildx
description: Official Docker CLI plugin for multi-platform builds backed by BuildKit

name: earthly
description: Containerized build automation with Dockerfile-meets-Makefile syntax

name: ko
description: Build and deploy Go applications as container images without a Dockerfile

name: nix2container
description: Build OCI images with Nix without `docker load` round-trips

name: Chainguard Images
description: Minimal, signed, SBOM-attested container images built on Wolfi

name: melange
description: Build apk packages from declarative YAML for use with apko

name: Wolfi
description: Undistro Linux designed for containers; glibc-based, signed, daily SBOMs

name: GCP Artifact Registry
description: :yen: Fast, private Docker image storage on Google Cloud Platform

name: kontain.me
description: On-demand container image registry that builds and serves images when they are pulled

name: crane
description: Lightweight CLI to manipulate registry images, from `go-containerregistry`

name: go-containerregistry
description: Go library and CLI tools (`crane`, `gcrane`, `registry`) for working with container registries

name: oras
description: Push and pull arbitrary OCI artifacts to and from any OCI registry

name: regctl
description: Daemonless registry client; copy, inspect, modify, and sign OCI images

name: Docker Scout
description: Official Docker CLI for SBOM generation, vulnerability analysis, and policy evaluation

name: cosign
description: Container signing, verification, and transparency log for OCI artifacts

name: in-toto
description: Framework for supply chain attestations; underpins SLSA and cosign provenance

name: policy-controller
description: Kubernetes admission controller enforcing cosign signatures on container images

name: witness
description: Generate and verify in-toto attestations across the build pipeline

name: Cloud Run Compose
description: :yen: Deploy `docker-compose

name: docker-socket-proxy
description: HAProxy-based fine-grained filter for the Docker API socket; widely used to expose a restricted socket to reverse proxies and homelab stacks

name: CodeFresh
description: :yen: End-to-end build, test, and share for Docker applications, with automated testing

name: cdebug
description: Swiss-army knife for debugging running containers via ephemeral sidecars; works with Docker, containerd, and Kubernetes
